Requirement: Servers SHALL support mutual TLS authentication for all incoming requests.
Servers SHALL verify certificate CNAME.
Servers SHALL verify certificate OU.
Servers SHALL support the following interaction : Search

Requirement: Slot resources SHALL NOT have a start date in the past.
Servers SHALL filter Slot resources based on the start date search parameters.
Servers SHALL return Slot resources within the requested time window.
[When no Slot is available in the requested time window Servers SHALL ] return an empty Bundle
Slot resources SHALL conform to the FrSlotAgregateur profile.
[When searching for Slot server SHALL] return Slot with Slot.status set to 'free' .
Slot resources SHALL have Slot.start and Slot.end.
Slot resources MUST include Slot.schedule reference.
Bundle resource SHALL conform to the BundleAgregateur profile.
[When searching for Slot server SHALL] return a Bundle with Bundle.type set to 'searchset'
[When searching for Slot server SHALL] include a Practitioner resource in the returned Bundle.
Practitioner resources MUST have Practitioner.identifier set with the national identifier (RPPS or ADELI).
Practitioner.identifier.value MUST be identifier a 12-digit number starting with '8'.
Practitioner.identifier.value MUST be the RPPS identifier of the practitioner
[When searching for Slot server SHALL]  include a PractitionerRole resource.
PractitionerRole resources MUST have PractitionerRole.organization.identifier set with a FINESS/SIRET identifier.
PractitionerRole resources MUST link to a practitioner resources using PractitionerRole.practitioner.reference.
PractitionerRole resources MUST contain a Location resources.
Slot resources MUST have Slot.meta.security field set with codes representing slot types.
Slot resources MUST have Slot.serviceType populated with consultation types.
[Slot resources with status set to free MUST] have Slot.comment set to a booking URL.
Servers SHALL support search on Slot resources using start query parameters.
Servers SHALL support search on Slot resources using status query parameters.
Servers SHALL support search on Slot resources using _include query parameters.
Servers SHALL support search on Slot resources using schedule.actor:Practitioner.identifer query parameters.
Servers SHALL support search on Slot resources using _include:iterate query parameters.
PractitionerRole resources SHALL conform to the FrPractitionerRoleExerciceAgregateur profile
Practitioner resources SHALL conform to the FrPractitionerAgregateur profile
[When a Practitioner has a name in the server database it SHALL] populate the Practitioner.name element
[When a Practitioner has a phone number in the server database it SHALL] populate the Practitioner.telecom.value (it must respect this format : +N°indicatifXXXXXXXXX)
[When a Practitioner has a phone number in the server database it SHALL] set the Practitioner.telecom.system field to "phone"
[When a Practitioner does not have  a phone number in the server database it SHALL NOT] have a Practitioner.telecom field
